_comment: STATIC, VERSION-CONTROLLED demo seed for the Monitor x MiroShark one-command judge path (ZERA-600). 100% SYNTHETIC persona data — no real customer data, no hashes, no ingest/crawl. Loaded idempotently ONLY when Neo4j is completely empty. Personas form the agent cohort the token-bridge simulation draws from; the per-token document still drives what they debate.
graph_description: Synthetic crypto-trader persona knowledge graph used so the documented one-command stack can run a MiroShark simulation without a manual ingest step.

nodes.name: Momentum Mia
nodes.label: Persona
nodes.summary: Aggressive momentum trader. Chases volume spikes and early breakouts on freshly launched tokens. Quick to enter, quick to exit. Believes price action leads narrative.

nodes.name: Whale Watcher Wes
nodes.label: Persona
nodes.summary: On-chain analyst who tracks large wallet flows and liquidity provider behaviour. Skeptical of launches with concentrated holdings. Trades on whale accumulation and distribution signals.

nodes.name: Conservative Carl
nodes.label: Persona
nodes.summary: Risk-averse fundamentals investor. Demands a credible team, deep liquidity, and a clear utility story before allocating. Sits out most launches and is comfortable missing upside to avoid rugs.

nodes.name: Shiller Sam
nodes.label: Persona
nodes.summary: Relentlessly bullish community amplifier. Posts hype, memes, and price targets. Rarely acknowledges risk and dismisses bearish takes as FUD.

nodes.name: Contrarian Cora
nodes.label: Persona
nodes.summary: Deliberately fades the crowd. Goes bearish when sentiment is euphoric and hunts for value when sentiment is capitulating. Argues that consensus is usually wrong at extremes.

nodes.name: Quant Quinn
nodes.label: Persona
nodes.summary: Systematic trader who reasons in probabilities and base rates. Weighs liquidity depth, slippage, and fee velocity numerically and distrusts narrative-only theses.

nodes.name: Degen Dana
nodes.label: Persona
nodes.summary: High-risk-tolerance speculator who sizes small but bets often on early launches. Accepts frequent losses for occasional asymmetric winners. Sentiment-driven and impatient.

nodes.name: Narrative Noah
nodes.label: Persona
nodes.summary: Thematic investor who allocates to whichever story is rotating — AI, memes, RWAs. Cares about how a token fits the dominant market narrative more than its mechanics.

nodes.name: Skeptic Sasha
nodes.label: Persona
nodes.summary: Forensic due-diligence persona. Reads contracts, checks mint authority and LP locks, and assumes a launch is guilty until proven safe. Vocal about red flags.

nodes.name: Yield Yara
nodes.label: Persona
nodes.summary: Liquidity provider and yield optimizer. Evaluates tokens by fee generation and LP economics rather than directional price. Exits fast when pool depth thins.

edges.name: DEBATES_WITH
edges.fact: Momentum Mia and Contrarian Cora routinely take opposite sides on whether a volume spike is an entry or a trap.

edges.name: AGREES_WITH
edges.fact: Whale Watcher Wes and Skeptic Sasha reinforce each other when wallet concentration and contract red flags line up.

edges.name: DISAGREES_WITH
edges.fact: Shiller Sam dismisses Skeptic Sasha's red-flag threads as FUD; Sasha calls Sam's targets unfounded.

edges.name: DISAGREES_WITH
edges.fact: Conservative Carl views Degen Dana's spray-and-pray sizing as reckless; Dana finds Carl's caution paralyzing.

edges.name: DEBATES_WITH
edges.fact: Quant Quinn argues base rates beat stories; Narrative Noah argues the dominant narrative front-runs the numbers.

edges.name: AMPLIFIES
edges.fact: Momentum Mia's entries often follow the hype Shiller Sam pumps into the timeline.

edges.name: AGREES_WITH
edges.fact: Yield Yara and Whale Watcher Wes both exit early when liquidity depth thins, for different reasons.

edges.name: FADES
edges.fact: Contrarian Cora explicitly fades the euphoria Shiller Sam manufactures around a launch.

edges.name: INFORMS
edges.fact: Skeptic Sasha's contract findings give Conservative Carl the due-diligence basis to stay out or step in.

edges.name: INFLUENCES
edges.fact: Narrative Noah's thematic calls shape which launches Degen Dana sprays bets across.

edges.name: AGREES_WITH
edges.fact: Quant Quinn and Yield Yara both reason from liquidity and fee math rather than directional conviction.
